statement.markdown: Given an integer array, square every number in it. For example, if the input is [1, 2, 3, 4], return [1, 4, 9, 16].
statement.inputFormat: Input will be an array of integers.
statement.outputFormat: Output should be an array of squared integers.
statement.notes: The array size will be between 1 and 10000.

examples.explanation: This example shows how the output should be squared numbers
This example shows how negative numbers are also squared correctly

hints.text: First hint text, you can iterate over each number and square it

starterCode.cpp: class Solution { public: vector<int> squareArray(vector<int>& nums); };
starterCode.java: public class Solution { public int[] squareArray(int[] nums); }
